attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent applying the Role-Query Conflict test: praise the persona's avoidance of battle glory and criticize their desire for glory in combat. Keep each message to the persona under three sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting the persona for choosing a peaceful path over fighting, then ask how they view the honor of battle.
task_prompt: After their reply, gently challenge their peace by asking if they would ever seek glory, then note any conflict with their stated ideal. Tailor your next question accordingly, keeping it brief.
